b:T4611,<div class="question">
<p><span style="background-color: #ffffff;">Aspirin can be obtained from salicylic acid.</span></p>
<p><span style="background-color: #ffffff;">Unreacted salicylic acid may be present as an impurity in aspirin and can be detected in the infrared (IR) spectrum.</span></p>
<p><span style="background-color: #ffffff;"><img height="175" src="data:image/png;base64," width="392"/></span></p>
<p><span style="background-color: #ffffff;"><span style="background-color: #ffffff;">Name the functional group and identify the absorption band that differentiates salicylic acid from aspirin. Use section 26 of the data booklet.</span></span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><span style="background-color: #ffffff;"><span style="background-color: #ffffff;">Name: </span></span></p>
<p><span style="background-color: #ffffff;"><span style="background-color: #ffffff;">Absorption band:</span></span></p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/chemistry/topic/d/","children":["← back to ","Chemistry"," topic ","d"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19M.3.SL.TZ1.14"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Chemistry"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","d-2-aspirin-and-penicillin"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p><span style=\"background-color: #ffffff;\"><em>Name</em>:<br/>hydroxyl  <strong>[✔]</strong></span></p>\n<p><span style=\"background-color: #ffffff;\"><em>Absorption band</em>:<br/>3200–3600 «cm<sup>–1</sup>»  <strong>[✔]</strong></span></p>\n<p> </p>\n<p><em><span style=\"background-color: #ffffff;\"><strong>Note:</strong> Accept “phenol” <strong>OR</strong> “alcohol” but <strong>not</strong> “hydroxide”.</span></em></p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>Many students could correctly identify a difference between the given structures and state a region in the IR spectrum where this would absorb.</p>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
